column10: We got his letters regularly. The letters____________by post. (SEND)
column16: Books were expensive because they___________out by hand. (COPY)
column17: Morse code_________once widely______to send telegraph messages, it_____sometimes___________now. (USE/USE)
column19: Goldfish_______often_________in pounds and aquariums as pets. (KEEP)
column20: Thousands of Americans rushed into Alaska when gold_____________there. (DISCOVER)
column21: A lullaby is a song that_____________to help babies to fall asleep. (SING)
column22: Yesterday the game_____________because of the rain. (POSTPONE)
column26: It was winter. The ground______________with snow. (COVER)
